name: @ont/adapter-resolver
description: ONT B4 adapter — the resolver. A read API (chain-derived convenience, NOT ownership authority) plus append-only submission store-guards that validate untrusted value-record submissions before appending to the off-chain mirror. The store-guards decide nothing about consensus ownership; their bar is no false append to the mirror.

scripts.test: npm run build -w @ont/protocol && npm run build -w @ont/bitcoin && npm run build -w @ont/wire && npm run build -w @ont/name-state-store && vitest run
